prompt: My page sections feel visually jumbled. I have form fields where it's hard to tell which label goes with which input. How do I fix the spacing?
assertions: Identifies the issue as ambiguous spacing or unclear proximity between related elements
Explains that related elements (label + input) should be closer to each other than to unrelated elements
Gives specific spacing values for label-to-input (small, e.g., 4-8px) vs group-to-group (larger, e.g., 16-24px)
